Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Document The Reaping game requirements

Comprehensive requirements documentation for dystopian AI vs human Russian roulette game:
- Core concept, theme, and aesthetic direction \(pixel art, cynical AI\)
- Game structure: HP system, magazines, rounds, AI eject mechanic
- Economy: bell curve wallets, betting system, freedom pass, leaderboard
- Complete game flow: lobby, reaping, gameplay, death/victory states
- Technical stack: Effect.ts, AI SDK, Neon, Redis, 8bitcn UI
- Magic numbers for balance tuning \(placeholders\)
- Future considerations: bet types, taunts, open questions

All requirements captured for Linear tracking and implementation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh issue create --title "Fix Effect Layer composition: DatabaseLayer dependencies not properly composed" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
**Severity**: High

**Description**:
`DatabaseDrizzleLayer` depends on the SQL client service provided by `DatabaseClientLayer`. Currently using `Layer.mergeAll` which places both layers side-by-side but does NOT feed one layer''s output into the other''s requirements.

The Drizzle layer''s dependency on `SqlClient` remains unsatisfied. The `as Effect.Effect<A, E, never>` cast in `withDatabase` hides this unsatisfied requirement at the type level, but at runtime any database operation through the Effect path \(e.g. `pingDatabaseEffect`\) will fail.

**Location**: 
- `packages/db/src/index.ts#L25-L34`

**Fix**:
Use `Layer.provideMerge` \(or equivalent composition\) so `DatabaseClientLayer` feeds into `DatabaseDrizzleLayer`.

**Bugbot ID**: 4b72bbf5-9d79-4968-b5e0-68eef5daa529
**Source**: https://github.com/stefan-garofalo/torinojs-swarm/pull/1#discussion_r2899007943
EOF
\)")
